examples: Even Sesame Street can get serious.
A regular McDonald's sesame-seed bun contains calcium propionate and sodium propionate—both preservatives.
Sweet dumpling is small dumpling balls made of glutinous rice flour with rose petals, sesame, walnut meat, dried fruit, sugar.
"One of these things is not like the other" runs the iconic "Sesame Street" learning rhyme.
Pretty slim margins for dishing out meat loaf and Jell-O (or rather, sesame-crusted tuna).
